_comment: Override knobs for src/retrieval/policy.ts. Anything omitted falls back to DEFAULT_POLICY in code. Set TUBEROSA_RETRIEVAL_POLICY=/abs/path.json to point elsewhere. Phase 4 knobs (additive): useTaskProfiles, taskProfiles.<taskType>.{sourceWeights,itemTypeBoosts}, useCoverageProfiles, coverageGlobal, coverageProfiles.<taskType>.{file,symbol,error,technology,businessArea}, graphHopWeights.{target,seed,depth2}, relationKindMultipliers.<relationType>, graphMaxHops (1 or 2). Generate calibrated weights with `pnpm run calibrate-fusion` — the script writes the patch here automatically. Phase 2/3 knobs still apply: useFreshnessMap, freshnessGlobal, freshnessPolicy, sourceWeights, hardSignalBoost, taskItemTypeBoosts, duplicateDetector*, piiRedaction, domainMismatch, suppressionEnabled, useOntology, useItemTypeInference, useAstExtractor.
